DP.522.0000:
Oh, hello! It’s been a while since
our last customer!
DP.522.0001:
Putting on a pair of glasses changes
how the world looks.\f
Taking off a pair of glasses changes
how the world looks, too. Deep, man.\f
DP.522.0002:
So, would you like to change how
the world looks to your Pokémon?\f
DP.522.0003:
Morning is the start of a new day.\f
Put on the Choice Specs and make
the right choices.\f
DP.522.0004:
The sunlight is bright in the day.
How about a pair of BlackGlasses?\f
DP.522.0005:
At night, reflect on what you’ve
learned with the Wise Glasses.\f
DP.522.0006:
Choice Specs make the Pokémon use
only one kind of move.\f
But they also raise the Pokémon’s
Special Attack stat.
DP.522.0007:
BlackGlasses raise the power of
Dark-type moves.
DP.522.0008:
The Wise Glasses boost the power of
special moves.
